'''mawafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zakat|zakat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-w-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zakat|zakat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mawafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæwæfæth|mæwæfæth]] || [[word:mæwæfæj|mæwæfæj]] || [[word:mæwæfæsh|mæwæfæsh]] || [[word:mæwæfæ|mæwæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mawawafath|mawawafath]] || [[word:mawawafaj|mawawafaj]] || [[word:mawawafash|mawawafash]] || [[word:mawawafa|mawawafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mawafath|mawafath]] || [[word:mawafaj|mawafaj]] || [[word:mawafash|mawafash]] || [[word:mawafa|mawafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mawaffath|mawaffath]] || [[word:mawaffaj|mawaffaj]] || [[word:mawaffash|mawaffash]] || [[word:mawaffaf|mawaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mawafatha|mawafatha]] || [[word:mawafaja|mawafaja]] || [[word:mawafasha|mawafasha]] || [[word:mawafaka|mawafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mawafath|mawafath]] || [[word:mawafaj|mawafaj]] || [[word:mawafash|mawafash]] || [[word:mawafa|mawafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mawafathal|mawafathal]] || [[word:mawafajal|mawafajal]] || [[word:mawafashal|mawafashal]] || [[word:mawafakal|mawafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mawafathatha|mawafathatha]] || [[word:mawafajaja|mawafajaja]] || [[word:mawafashasha|mawafashasha]] || [[word:mawafaka|mawafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mawafathan|mawafathan]] || [[word:mawafajan|mawafajan]] || [[word:mawafashan|mawafashan]] || [[word:mawafakan|mawafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mawafathaoro|mawafathaoro]] || [[word:mawafajaoro|mawafajaoro]] || [[word:mawafashaoro|mawafashaoro]] || [[word:mawafakaoro|mawafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
